waiver.reason_summary: The remote build-server gate could not be reached or stayed unavailable long enough to block the governed pre-push path.
waiver.detail: Remote pre-push gate fell back to local fallback. All failing checks (agent-standards, ansible-lint, atlas-lint, schema-validation, service-completeness) are pre-existing on origin/main and not introduced by ADR-0346 Outline automation merge.
substitute_evidence: All failures confirmed pre-existing on origin/main HEAD (1d6f1402c)
